text:
On a quiet Saturday morning, Emma sat at her desk lost in thought. Her cat, Milo, prowled around with a slightly guilty look on his face. 

Finally giving up, Emma decided to play a trick on him. She placed a few seeds in an old pie tin and hid them from sight among some grass.

"Where's your prize, Milo?" she called.

"No treats?" Milo ventured tentatively.

"No treats?" Emma repeated skeptically.

Then, gleefully, she scooped up a small handful of grass seeds.

"Oh! There's your treasure!" she exclaimed. 

She chuckled and carried the tin outside. Milo curled up at her feet, waiting. Emma planted the seeds, watered them, and sat down to watch.

After a few days, something started poking up from the soil. She peeked. There were little blades appearing.

"That must be our winners," she thought, proud of her little garden sprout.
